title: Official Risers Modpack
body:
# Risers Official Modpack
The Ultimate PvP & Crystal Experience

This modpack is carefully crafted with all the essential mods used by the Risers members, optimized for better crystal PvP, smoother gameplay, and enhanced performance. It also includes the exclusive Risers Texture Pack for a unique, signature look.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

But that’s not all — we’ve integrated a Feather Client–like experience directly into the modpack, giving you premium Feather Client features for free without any extra setup but sadly we can't provide it in modrinth so join our discord server !

</details>



Whether you're a competitive player or just want to vibe with the Risers community, this modpack is your perfect PvP companion.

Level up. Play smart. Stay sharp.
